# Match Report — Crimson City vs Azure United

*Simulated demonstration match generated by the PitchIQ engine.*

## Executive Summary
Crimson City controlled the ball (65% possession, field tilt 0.19 in favour of Azure United). The more aggressive press came from Azure United (PPDA 0.4 vs 0.4).
Data confidence: **high**. Positions come from ground truth (simulator or data provider), not from computer vision — treat the numbers as exact.

## Tactical Narrative
**Crimson City** set up in a 4-3-3 with the ball (width 48.2 m) and a 4-3-3 without it — 4-3-3 in possession → 4-3-3 out of possession.
Off the ball they defended in a mid block (defensive line 29.8 m from goal, depth 32.2 m).
**Azure United** set up in a 4-4-2 with the ball (width 46.8 m) and a 4-2-3-1 without it — 4-4-2 in possession → 4-2-3-1 out of possession.
Off the ball they defended in a mid block (defensive line 37.1 m from goal, depth 42.2 m).
Crimson City registered 67 pressures (16.75/min), average press height 32.2 m, converting 60% into turnovers within 3 s.
Azure United registered 52 pressures (13.0/min), average press height 64.7 m, converting 56% into turnovers within 3 s.
Line-breaking passes: 7 ({"away": 4, "home": 3}).
